title: Shinji is a XTC fan
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is a XTC fan?!             Quote Post by chocky » Fri Jul 16, 2004 7:54 pm I noticed in one of the episodes that Shinji has a logo of the band XTC on his T Shirt at the back of his neck. I wonder if that was in the storyboards or if one the animaters was a XTC fan and put it in for a laugh! Did anyone else notice this?!?

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:01 pm Yeah.. It was just a regular T-shirt... I don't think Shinji has anything t odo with cars. But Sadamoto is.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:11 pm Yeah, he puts 20 year old car designs in his stuff to...

[]:             Quote Post by chocky » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:30 pm Car designs? I meant the pop group XTC. Thier early logo (late 70s early80s) pops up on Shinjis t shirt at one point.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Jul 16, 2004 9:04 pm is that what his shirt says in Japanese? when Asuka walks out of the shower?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Jul 16, 2004 9:10 pm XTC is also a term for the drug, "ecstasy."

[]:             Quote Post by chocky » Fri Jul 16, 2004 9:40 pm This is the logo I'm on about! http://images.amazon.com/images/P/B00005ATHI.01.LZZZZZZZ.jpg Sorry, dont know how to post up or create a link :roll: Also click on the album cover in the top right of this page for a clear B&W version of the logo. http://www.xtcidearecords.co.uk/discs/discs_1.htm And in Eva its on the back of a grey Tshirt (I think!!)

[]:             Quote Post by chocky » Fri Jul 16, 2004 9:43 pm EDIT: on the second link click on Discography, choose "White Music" then click on the little album art to see it clearly!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:04 pm Interesting. I assumed that the XTC was a reference to something, but I never took the time to look into it. Shinji loves his cheesy J-Pop.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:23 pm Ew, god. I never would have noticed that. Actually, one of my friends mentioned something like that when I was watching Eva, (She's into the 80's pop thing) but I had absolutely no clue what she was talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:32 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji loves his cheesy J-Pop.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon May 23, 2005 8:47 pm I had a theory once that this shirt might have been one of Misato's that she gave to him on his first night in Tokyo-3. It is after all, WAY to big for Shinji. Perhaps it was an old boyfriends or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 23, 2005 10:01 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I had a theory once that this shirt might have been one of Misato's that she gave to him on his first night in Tokyo-3. It is after all, WAY to big for Shinji. Perhaps it was an old boyfriends or something.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon May 23, 2005 11:47 pm YES

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue May 24, 2005 7:58 am I was a theory. The shirt was really big after all. But hey, isn't overanalysing what Eva fandom is all about? I mean, if we were the types to just accept things, we'd hardly be here 8+ years after the fact, still debating what the hell this whole series is about.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 24, 2005 12:07 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I was a theory.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue May 24, 2005 1:40 pm Your right of course. What drew me to Shinji's wearing of the shirt was the contridiction between him wearing an oversized shirt and his compulsive neat freak nature. Perhaps the shirt is his minds little way of breaking free every once in a while from its self imposed repression.... Or he just likes wearing baggy T-shirts. I like wearing baggy T-shirts too.

[]: Re: Shinji is a XTC fan?!             Quote Post by Director Black » Wed Nov 30, 2016 9:01 pm To be fair, many of the themes XTC discuss in their songs appear in Eva.

[]: Re: Shinji is a XTC fan?!             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Nov 30, 2016 11:15 pm Dear God is pretty decent.

[]: Re: Shinji is a XTC fan?!             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Thu Dec 01, 2016 10:07 am As a quick trip to Google trends will make clear, Dear God was only popular in the American territories - indeed the only country in the grip of fanatical sectarianism and supernatural delusion. More to the point, the only entry on the evawiki links to a youtube of the song 'Making Plans for Nigel' (that's been taken down since) - for which they're far better known in their native UK: seminal British '70s New Wave rock wrote: WE'RE ONLY MAKING PLANS FOR NIGEL WE ONLY WANT WHAT'S BEST FOR HIM WE'RE ONLY MAKING PLANS FOR NIGEL NIGEL JUST NEEDS THAT HELPING HAND ... WE'RE ONLY MAKING PLANS FOR NIGEL HE HAS THIS FUTURE IN-A BRITISH STEEL WE'RE ONLY MAKING PLANS FOR NIGEL NIGEL'S WHOLE FUTURE IS AS GOOD AS SEALED"
summary:
[]: Shinji is a XTC fan?!             Quote Post by chocky » Fri Jul 16, 2004 7:54 pm I noticed in one of the episodes that Shinji has a logo of the band XTC on his T Shirt at the back of his neck. I wonder if that was in the storyboards or if one the animaters was a XTC fan and put it in for a laugh! Did anyone else notice this?!?

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Fri Jul 16, 2
